steps.title: Identify what the task requires
steps.content: The student wants to “indicate how long Elliot Vance's musical piece will last.” The correct choice must directly state the duration from the notes.

steps.title: Apply this requirement to the choices
steps.content: Lasting 639 years, Elliot Vance's musical piece will be the longest continuous musical performance in history. begins with “Lasting 639 years,” which directly conveys the duration and fulfills the stated goal. The other three choices focus on the composer, location, and instrument while omitting the duration entirely. That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
